# Amanah — full reference for AI agents

Autonomous compliant RWA treasury agent on Casper testnet (Casper Agentic
Buildathon 2026). This file is the complete reference backing SKILL.md.

## Network

- Chain: casper-test
- Node RPC (keyless): https://node.testnet.casper.network/rpc
- Explorer: https://testnet.cspr.live
- Indexer: CSPR.cloud REST https://api.testnet.cspr.cloud (header `authorization: <key>`)
- CSPR.cloud Streaming (WS): wss://streaming.testnet.cspr.cloud/contract-events?contract_hash=<hash>
- Official CSPR.cloud MCP: https://mcp.testnet.cspr.cloud/mcp (header `X-CSPR-Cloud-Api-Key: <key>`)

## Agent account

- Public key: 0147ebe715f3fb6d387ae2f102e55032ba54c8c4557293d7800cad11561496fdaa
- Account hash: 27e5e2b0c3840da2cf061c0cb4d7469c96764d5761b969b3f8314149d796358f

## Deployed contracts (package hash · contract hash)

| Contract | Package hash | Contract hash |
|----------|--------------|---------------|
| RwaVault (v6, quorum enforced on-chain + circuit breakers: reputation floor + dead-man's switch; principal $800K) | 8ff5d18815e66eb50b9dfdf287cc622a48b29c93c4c58b51ad79e2e020815c87 | 3a6a434f14374e9b3f3a13b1aa9fc2391005abd1e2cd364cdd3716794c29d2ef |
| AttestationLog | 365913a7a26d3e50798c2c0ce31d0850b8b24b2e1a641f990e41f7ad219a6532 | c214ac3fe6c8f832eefd8ff6d7ed6afe9fb7a11b6048fa0a77ffc04fd874f003 |
| SpendGate (v2, check gated to vault; custodian-owned) | f19ed0e9b235e8422aef7d8fbbcaa9cbc34ef4864efd81bbeb7c82d2b77d0cf3 | f1c0eb4f6f62bf1132d94de3e9b3946495fa91ebcfe652daeaa365b7b91451bf |
| ComplianceRegistry (v3, set_status/revoke owner-gated to custodian) | 93bc5e1389517acfb57b659ec1427c2979d6d931f1c1d587537427d5595f9ea5 | e5838f96bb7e010cd952d00e780e948e532b6d59dee3cdb6fe29e10fa598e863 |
| ReputationRegistry (v4, adjust + record_payment authority-only) | 265ebc7dc27997529587517c8a6cc502fd187f163fefe4d3e0946ba10438669c | c7b55a43217d17a44197dab44bb40762f1a179c085f456c772469e7643ae8dee |
| AuditorLog (auditor's APPROVE/VETO, custodian key) | ec0721feef72482e745e8950f57fb17def15a51dda382f31de0004e886b1bf89 | 439c39829d9093016167a83e6bcfcb5f7dcff908e854f35c9b2fec58b504d85a |
| PaymentToken (CEP-18+CEP-3009) | d784f72c17d143cd96e8bcd2b19fc893f003c1ce9ea29f059eb033bcbd347d79 | — |
| ZkKycVerifier (on-chain Schnorr NIZK, real ZK KYC) | e9394a31557d33a6f5f26e4d5d996f7cbd7e98138cef60cc5921eee2617dfd0f | — |
| AuditorQuorum (K-of-N independent auditors, signed on-chain votes) | 55c09fab84ef3153a1872da422af15c61127d72fd0e1b08f6da2520accd3a293 | — |
| ZkReserves (ZK proof-of-reserves: Pedersen+Schnorr, hides the split) | 5b84d2f911d4bed7e7345c22a0236794b5dc8033f3fb8870595b0fb6e8f3688a | fca6a030b00a… |

## Verifiable proof transactions (open on testnet.cspr.live/deploy/<hash>)

- Attestation (reasoning signed + verified on-chain): a87e10c77a873ace20d580b13d4b0c2a31e6899ed0ac5fe92412f3145dd870e8
- x402 settlement (CEP-3009 transfer_with_authorization): 391274dcad1ebd7dd2641bd94aa17893084adf76f58b5603d7d69c0c4cce4398
- Reallocate v2 (custodian-owned gates, vault principal $800K): e81b4abc0c96b73d2c3d65e4800b2c208e106c78fc0ab57e552fa82c1c6f7149
- Reputation (record_payment, anti-replay): de899bef804a0cce3f0e77b9db08e8f4226e097245098ea7bbca0eb469b90711
- Auditor VETO (2nd agent blocked a flawed move, on-chain): 987a3700aeb127649d26680fe5c92012f5d4990a24a6dc0f13e4f177936afe11
- Auditor APPROVE (grade 0.9) -> reallocate executed: 93585d75dd8133bde3e40803ecb8e6fdfcb8c9acefdbbd26405aa13e09528f1e
- Reputation slash (custodian docked score on veto): a2ac131fb79dd1ae208a57719db86caa77806c0a22f3443f338e0112655977fc
- Zero-knowledge KYC (Schnorr NIZK verified ON-CHAIN, secret never sent): da738fc1b49bea83988956dae45543785a71279be5a6dcb5582ddab5c0882ed4
- Circuit breaker BLOCKED reallocate (agent below reputation floor): 82dc878b617a352f999d15577ce58660a8e107496d19ce7870dba0cde85e2350
- Circuit breaker RESUMED (reputation recovered): 09073684a1c8c17dbfae143aafb2d8c443ea7bd51f4296ae5b9fa566d538c6fe
- Auditor quorum 2-of-3 signed APPROVE votes: 483f66cdbdc0803333f35c7f70ad8bde3bd32e275e66af7ba83aaf6c27f64ca2 + 06fabab9e810edabc6106134ae3d0cd379a7d5839062330b486915bc3013daa4
- ZK proof-of-reserves verified ON-CHAIN (hidden split, sum >= principal): 5be256a3b3b9aa4a33e8ea78646984edcfb91730e950d8d8eb054a83a4517793
- QUORUM ENFORCED ON-CHAIN: vault refused an unapproved decision (NotApproved/err 16): ba368de335840645486c7692cf1fdee8b0ca3f7f61514091515a32052ac2d7b7
- Quorum-approved decision executed on the same vault: e68d42184b6f7fac2e226bea10c6a3e0942a276da6d6065618ac0f2d6c533c8e

## Amanah MCP server (stdio) — tool I/O

- get_vault_state() -> { treasuryId, totalTreasury, holdings[], guards[], principalLocked }
  holdings = [{ name, sub, value (USD), change }]. guards read live from SpendGate.
- get_audit_trail() -> [{ kind, hash, status, time }] (recent deploys for our contracts)
- get_attestation(hash) -> { reasoningHash, decision, signer, blockTime, verified, note }
  `verified` = local blob hashes back to `hash`. Always cross-check the deploy on cspr.live.
- get_reputation(address) -> { address, score, note }  (account-hash; score is on-chain i64)

## On-chain state decode (no entrypoint call needed)

Odra stores each Var/Mapping field in the contract's "state" dictionary:
- item key  = blake2b256( be32(field_index) ++ mapping_key_bytes )   (fields 1-indexed; 0 reserved)
- dict addr = blake2b256( state_seed_uref_addr ++ ascii(item_key) )
- query JSON-RPC state_get_dictionary_item { Dictionary: "dictionary-<addr>" }
- U256/U512 values are stored as a List<U8> blob = [significant_byte_count, ...little-endian]
- i64 parsed comes back as an 8-byte little-endian array; enum (Status/AssetId) as a 1-byte variant
- Mapping<Address,_> key = Key::Account bytesrepr = [0x00] + 32 account-hash bytes

State-dict seeds (uref addr, hex): vault aefd17288cab1e066e2b3a4b3b5c7192b679963aae18bd891048bcab050c4d0e,
reputation 05a27b6e8bd53fda50cdbb2e322f56912ed92b44cdd4f4c1a282a9c8440d5a84,
attestation 739ed994a635834f536dee0f3af7a7ce5341d91ef6952a548aed7a3de0b0594a,
spendgate 9837b12300bc72b37c876392e89773112e09b12aedd06bcf4f8b5793b19226de,
compliance 7fafb35c455edeecabdb92714a410ea43ce3c3bc3a8dcc68f55468b98320bcbc,
zk-reserves 4fa08858505d78271ee58c8e640ec5e0827176492a3f8c70845c5cfab76c8b1b.
RwaVault v6 extra fields: reputation=6, min_reputation=7 (i64), custodian=8, last_heartbeat=9 (u64), frozen=10 (bool), quorum=11 (Address).
ZkReserves fields: solvent=1 (bool), last_total=2 (u64). AuditorQuorum: threshold Var + approvals/voted Mappings.
RwaVault fields: allocations=1 (key=1-byte AssetId Gold0/TBond1/WTI2/CSPR3), principal_locked=2.
SpendGate fields: max_per_tx=2, daily_limit=3, spent_today=4 (U512, 6-dp USD), allowlist=7.
ReputationRegistry: score=1 (Mapping<Address,i64>). ComplianceRegistry v3 fields: owner=1, status=2 (Mapping<Address,Status>, 0=Pending,1=Valid,2=Revoked), identity_hash=3.

## The cycle (what the agent does each CYCLE_MS)

ingest live RWA prices -> enrich via official CSPR.cloud MCP (balance + CSPR rate)
-> pay multi-asset premium signal via x402 (CEP-3009 settle, real tx) -> LLM reason (Venice)
-> blake2b(reasoning) + Ed25519 sign -> AttestationLog.attest (verifies sig ON-CHAIN, publishes blob)
-> K-of-N AuditorQuorum votes -> SpendGate.check + ComplianceRegistry.assert_valid
-> RwaVault.reallocate (yield only; the VAULT itself re-checks AuditorQuorum.approved())
-> ReputationRegistry.record_payment.

## Errors (shared enum, on-chain reverts)

1 NotAuthorized · 2 OverTxCap · 3 NotAllowlisted · 4 OverDailyLimit · 5 Expired ·
6 NotCompliant · 7 InvalidAttestation · 8 UnknownSigner · 9 ReplayedProof ·
10 TouchesPrincipal · 11 InsufficientAllocation · 12 AddressNotSet · 13 Frozen ·
14 BelowReputationFloor · 15 NotStale · 16 NotApproved (auditor quorum has not approved).

## Repo

https://github.com/PugarHuda/amanah-casper — see README.md, DEMO.md, USER_STEPS.md.
